name: terniq
description: Codex-native workflow plugin for serious software work: planning, design, review, debugging, reading, research, writing, and environment health.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-native workflows for serious software work
interface.longDescription: Use Terniq to plan before implementation, design interfaces with intent, review diffs before merge, debug from evidence, read sources cleanly, research unfamiliar domains, edit prose without AI stiffness, and audit the Codex environment itself.
defaultPrompt: Review this diff before I merge it
Help me debug this failing integration
Plan this feature before we implement it
Research this topic from primary sources
Audit my Codex setup and tell me what is drifting
